LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-10-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS TO THE LIABILITY ISSUE AND MR. SALTZBERG'S MEDICAL BATTERY CLAIM. PARTIES ARE TO PROVIDE PROPOSED ORDERS AS TO THESE TWO ISSUES BY MAY 24, 2024. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE AS IT STANDS. DEFENDANT'S (THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA) MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AND DENIED IN PART. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE MINI MINUTES/WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) Off Calendar Jun-27-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-07-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION .
Off Calendar May-28-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. BENJAMIN SIMINOU, Esq. and June Bashant, Esq. (via Zoom videoconference) of Singleton Schreiber LLP (tel:619-704-3288) for Plaintiffs.
Atty. ALEXANDRA SEIBERT, Esq., Julie Hansen-Arenas, Esq. and Elton Rushing, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington LLP (tel: 415-288-9800) for Defendant.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission as to the liability issue and Mr. Saltzberg's medical battery claim. Parties are to provide proposed orders as to these two issues by May 24, 2024. The Court adopts its tentative as it stands.

Defendant's (The Regents of the University of California) motion for summary adjudication is granted and denied in part.

Order signed. (see mini minutes/word minutes for complete ruling.)

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR #10619 (tel:925-226-8222 / e-mail:raquel@transcriptlegal.com). (302/RCE)
